keyPoints: Water Pollution Sources: Industrial effluent, Agricultural runoff, Sewage disposal
Noise Pollution Sources: Construction sites, Traffic, Loud speakers
Air Pollution Sources: Fossil fuel combustion, Industrial processes, Biomass burning
Water Pollution Impacts: Aquatic life affected, Drinking water contaminated, Ecosystem disruption
Noise Pollution Impacts: Hearing loss, Sleep disturbance, Anxiety and stress
Air Pollution Impacts: Respiratory problems, Cardiovascular disease, Cancer
Preventive Measures: Implement pollution control technologies, Promote sustainable practices, Educate public awareness
Public Health Aspects: Waterborne diseases, Noise-induced hearing loss, Air pollution exacerbates existing respiratory conditions
